# LC Bridge (Lead Connector Bridge)

> LC Bridge builds white-label integrations that run inside the HighLevel (GoHighLevel) CRM — connecting tools like DocuSign and Google Sheets directly to LeadConnector workflows.

LC Bridge, legally Lead Connector Bridge, is an integration vendor for the HighLevel / GoHighLevel CRM ecosystem (also searched as "LeadConnector"). Products are white-label add-ons that agencies and businesses install into their HighLevel sub-accounts. Built by a team that helped build HighLevel's API and App Marketplace.

## Products

- [DocuSign Integration for HighLevel](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/product/docusign-integration/): Send, track, and sync DocuSign e-signature envelopes from inside HighLevel/LeadConnector workflows. Auto-fills documents from contact fields; signed status triggers workflows. White-label, no code.
- [Google Sheets Integration for HighLevel](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/product/google-sheets-integration/): Two-way real-time sync between HighLevel contacts/records and Google Sheets. Launching soon; early access open.

## Industry guides

- [DocuSign for Insurance](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/product/docusign-integration/insurance): E-signature workflows for insurance agencies running on HighLevel (applications, ACORD-style forms).
- [DocuSign for Real Estate](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/product/docusign-integration/real-estate): E-signature workflows for real estate teams running on HighLevel (listing and buyer agreements).

## Guides

- [GoHighLevel Integrations: The Complete Guide](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/blog/gohighlevel-integrations/): What GoHighLevel integrations are, native vs Zapier, and the full LC Bridge integration directory for the HighLevel CRM.
- [The 4 Levels of CRM Integration](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/blog/four-levels-of-integration/): A See–Know–Do framework for telling a deep, native integration from a Zapier bolt-on. Covers native integration vs Zapier and integration depth.
- [An AI Agent Can't Chase a Signature It Can't See](https://leadconnectorbridge.com/blog/ai-agents-need-deep-integrations/): Why AI-agent readiness (agentic CRM, GoHighLevel AI agent) depends on how deep your CRM integrations go.
